headline: Diversified Banks Stocks Q4 Teardown: U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB) Vs The Rest
summary: The end of the earnings season is always a good time to take a step back and see who shined (and who not so much). Let’s take a look at how diversified banks stocks fared in Q4, starting with U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB).

headline: A Look At U.S. Bancorp (USB) Valuation As Brokerage Transition Sparks Efficiency Hopes
summary: Stock performance snapshot and recent returns U.S. Bancorp (USB) is attracting attention as investors reassess recent returns and valuation metrics following a period of mixed share performance over different time frames. The stock shows a roughly 0.5% gain over the past day, a 3.9% decline over the past week, a 13.5% decline over the past month, and a smaller 2.5% decline over the past 3 months. headline: How Might Stocks React After The FOMC's March 2026 Rate Decision?
summary: The Fed is expected to hold rates in March 2026 as CPI hits 2.4% and credit risks, oil, or tariffs impact bank stocks. Read more on the FOMC's decision here.

headline: South Korea passes special bill to implement its $350 billion U.S. investment pledge
summary: Seoul will now have the legal framework it needs to carry out its investment commitment made to Washington in exchange for more favorable "reciprocal" tariff rates.

headline: Inside India newsletter: How the war in the Middle East is set to determine India's trade route to Europe
summary: As the U.S.-Israel war with Iran rages on, experts say that only one of India's two grand connectivity bets has a real future: IMEC.
